Sikkim

Pabong

The Untouched Himalayan Hamlet

Silent snow-blanketed village under crystal skies, warmth glowing from wooden cottages.

4.4
(56 reviews)
Mangan, Sikkim
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
18°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

About Pabong

Pabong is a pristine village in North Sikkim, surrounded by snow-capped peaks, alpine meadows, and rhododendron forests. A paradise for nature lovers and solitude seekers.

A traditional Lepcha settlement that has remained largely untouched by modern tourism.

mountainsnatureculturetrekkingphotography

Quick Facts

Altitude
2,100 m
Weather
Pleasant throughout the year
Best Time
October to May
Rating
4.4 (56 reviews)
Ideal For
Solo, Couples, Families, Seniors
